race.comment: LITTLEBOURKESTREET (2) was denied narrowly from making return at headquarters last month. Is sure to have come on from that and keeps Holder. Leading player. TRIPOD TERROR (1) finds it tough to land the second win but it certainly hasn't been without trying. Backs up quickly after closing off nicely into the placings on Saturday. Will likely drift back from his draw and be taking big strides late. OUR LITTLE STAR (7) has proven frustrating for punters this campaign but gets the chance to change her fortunes for the new stable. Drops back to a winning trip off 26 days and is right in the mix. JILL ON ICE (8) is ready to make her return after a strong trial win here in readiness. Worth noting she got off the mark when resuming last time in. Drawn to advantage and should give a very bold sight, though may be vulnerable late first-up off 301 days. UNCLE BARRY (4) got off the mark stylishly when resuming at Port Lincoln. This is tougher but he deserves following up.
